backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, chart analysis storage/retrieval, user settings, and Gemini API key management with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features related to rewriting the Gemini API prompt for next-candle prediction and adding robust JSON parsing/error handling in the frontend analysis service.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key UI/logic details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart palette variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a useCamera hook that handles starting/stopping the camera, capturing photos, and displaying Portuguese-localized error and action UI.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance level lines and directional trend arrows over a chart image retrieved from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop file upload component that validates image files (PNG, JPG, WebP, max 10MB), rejects HEIC/HEIF formats with a warning, and calls an `onFileSelect` callback with the chosen file.
Renders a clickable card for a past chart analysis entry, displaying the signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/etc.), confidence percentage, and trend direction, then navigates to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a min-height background, renders child routes via `<Outlet>`, includes a toast notifier, and displays a footer with attribution.
Displays a single step in a multi-stage processing indicator, showing a spinner when active, a checkmark when complete, or an idle dot otherwise.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the primary analysis result card showing the trading signal (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Provides utility functions to build the Gemini Vision API URL with an API key query parameter, retrieve request headers, and validate the stored API key format via the backend actor.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context that manages light/dark theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts the first image item from the clipboard, exposing it as a `File` state along with any permission error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, Gemini API key, and daily operation progress.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries, exposing a unified interface for reading and updating user settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a trading chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then storing it in sessionStorage and navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to the Analyze, History, and Settings pages.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using useGetAnalyses, showing a loading state or an empty-state prompt when no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Displays a multi-stage processing screen that loads a chart image from sessionStorage, validates the Gemini API key, sends the image for analysis, and navigates to the results page or shows error states (API key missing, 404, chart detection failure).
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the analysis results page, displaying trend direction, candlestick patterns, signal strength, confidence, and a chart overlay thumbnail loaded from sessionStorage, with share and save actions.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing authenticated users to configure their Gemini API key, AI sensitivity, default timeframe, notifications, and daily operation limit, with theme toggling and Internet Identity login support.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Service that preprocesses chart images (MIME validation, resizing >4MB) and sends them to the Gemini Vision API for next-candle prediction, returning a typed ApiAnalysisResponse or throwing AnalysisApiError on failure.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response (ApiAnalysisResponse) including signal, trend, confidence, patterns, strength, and error fields, along with a generic ApiError type.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond BigInt timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps the external Gemini API response (ApiAnalysisResponse) to the internal AnalysisResult format, converting signals to AnalysisDirection enums, patterns to CandlestickPattern enums, and handling chart detection errors as a special result structure.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Provides a `shareAnalysis` utility that formats a trading analysis result into Portuguese text and shares it via the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy for unsupported browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, spacing, shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing Advance Signal Pro's architecture, features, known issues, and versioned feature list for a mobile financial chart analysis app powered by the Gemini Vision API.
